overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist traversing a desolate black sand beach in a rainy, overcast alien environment. The character wades through a brown river, walks along the rocky shoreline, places a portable ladder to cross a gap, and continues across rugged terrain toward another water crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow brown river with rocky banks

events.description: character exits the river onto black sand beach

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-deep brown river water toward the shore

entered.detail: tall thin vertical structures extending into the cloudy sky
misty mountains visible in the background
large dark rock formations scattered along the shoreline
murky brown water with visible current and ripples

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a shallow brown river in a desolate alien landscape. Tall strand pillars and misty mountains are visible in the distance against an overcast sky. The character moves steadily toward the black volcanic shore and exits the water onto the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: black sand beach along the river shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the black sand beach following the river shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the black sand beach with the brown river visible to the left. The terrain is flat and desolate, with large volcanic rock formations passing by on the right. The tall strand structures remain visible in the distance as the character maintains a steady pace along the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with portable ladder placement

events.description: character places a portable ladder across a rocky gap
character climbs and crosses the ladder to the other side

agents.ego_description: placing a portable ladder to bridge a gap and carefully crossing over it

entered.detail: metal ladder placed across a gap in the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a gap in the rocky terrain and places a portable ladder to create a bridge. After positioning the ladder, the character carefully crosses over it to the other side. The surrounding area consists of dark gravel and rocks near the river's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside with sparse vegetation approaching the river

events.description: character walks down rocky slope and enters shallow water

agents.ego_description: traversing the uneven rocky terrain toward the river

entered.detail: turbulent water with white rapids visible ahead

segments.scene_description: After crossing the ladder, the character continues across a rugged hillside with sparse patches of grass. The terrain becomes more uneven as the character approaches a fast-flowing section of the river. The character descends the rocky slope and enters the shallow water at the river's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a desolate alien shoreline, moving from a shallow river crossing through rugged volcanic terrain. It begins with the character wading through a brown river toward a black volcanic beach, with misty mountains and tall strand pillars looming under an overcast sky. As the character exits the water, the scene shifts to a steady trek along the flat, dark sands, passing large volcanic rock formations while the river remains to the left. The movement then pauses at a gap in the rocky terrain where the character deploys a portable ladder to bridge the divide before continuing across a rugged, grassy hillside. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly uneven as the camera follows the character descending a rocky slope to enter another fast-flowing section of the river.
